purpose: Single-job release flow: prepare → wait CI → merge → publish → deploy → notify. No orchestrator chain — runs end-to-end inside one workflow run.

issue.description: GitHub issue number that triggered the release.

dry-run.description: Print plan without writing files, committing, or opening a PR.

prefer.description: On release/vX.Y.Z branch collision: 'ours' force-pushes; 'theirs' reuses the existing PR.

success: release completes and returns a valid canonical result
failure: release cannot return a valid canonical result
